title: Dismissal of petition
doc_html:
Art. 876.  Dismissal of petition

The court shall dismiss a petition on the motion of the district attorney.

Acts 1991, No. 235, §8, eff. Jan. 1, 1992; Acts 2011, No. 172, §1.
